meta.question: Are there any organizations with models related to medical or healthcare processes?
meta.finalAnswer: Yes, there is at least one organization with models related to medical or healthcare processes. Organization "Org65" contains a model titled "Doctor-patient recipe".

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?org ?orgName ?model ?modelName WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?modelName .
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org .
  ?org rdfs:label ?orgName .
  FILTER(
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "medical") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "healthcare") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "hospital") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "patient") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?modelName), "health")
  )
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The query successfully identified an organization (Org65) that has a model related to medical/healthcare processes ("Doctor-patient recipe"). No further exploration is needed.

request.answer: Yes, there is at least one organization with models related to medical or healthcare processes. Organization "Org65" contains a model titled "Doctor-patient recipe".

events.finalAnswer: Yes, there is at least one organization with models related to medical or healthcare processes. Organization "Org65" contains a model titled "Doctor-patient recipe".
